name: io.github.den-indance/shopify-mcp-pro
description: Shopify MCP server with real analytics (ShopifyQL), auto-refresh auth, and Shopify API 2026-04.

environmentVariables.name: SHOPIFY_STORE_DOMAIN
environmentVariables.description: Your Shopify store domain, e.g. my-store.myshopify.com

environmentVariables.name: SHOPIFY_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Client ID from Shopify Dev Dashboard (custom app)

environmentVariables.name: SHOPIFY_CLIENT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Client Secret from Shopify Dev Dashboard (custom app)
